rationale: Heading '5.1.1 Trial Arms and Trial Elements' byte-exact at p.51. heading_level=3 matches L3 in TOC. parent_section §5.1 [The Trial Design Model] follows N11 chapter-short-bracket for L2-with-L3-children.
